name: @ancientpantheon/codex-ui
description: React/browser interface layer of the Codex family — the chain-generic DOM shell: <CodexProvider> (injected store/resolver/zbom-toast seams), the 16 hooks + their *View types, the generic slot-driven shell components, and the ui.css stylesheet. No value @stoachain, no value Ouronet import (type-only OK).
_devDependenciesComment: react/react-dom/lucide-react are mirrored here at peer-satisfying ranges so the workspace install materializes them (npm does not auto-install a package's own peerDeps). @ancientpantheon/codex-ouronet AND @stoachain/stoa-core are TYPE-ONLY: codex-ui `import type`s the byte-stable entity View types from '@ancientpantheon/codex-ouronet/types' and the Kadena signing View types (IKadenaKeypair, PactClient, CodexSigningStrategy) from '@stoachain/stoa-core/signing' — both erased at runtime under verbatimModuleSyntax, so they stay out of `dependencies`, but are declared here so the emitted .d.ts are self-contained (a downstream/isolated tsc can resolve the referenced types). @stoachain/stoa-core is NOT hoisted to the workspace root (it lives in codex-ouronet/node_modules), so codex-ui must declare it for its own tsc to resolve the type-only import.
